perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a white shrug stands in front of a Costco freezer, pointing at boxes of Milo ice cream. (2) The scene shifts to close-ups of the product packaging in the store. (3) Transition to an indoor home setting where two women sit at a table with the product box. (4) One woman holds up an ice cream bar, showing its texture and size compared to her fingers. (5) A close-up shows the ice cream bar bitten in half, with white liquid filling flowing out. (6) Both women eat the ice cream, nodding and showing enthusiastic facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music plays continuously throughout. (2) A male narrator provides a energetic voiceover, describing product details and price. (3) Occasional high-pitched female exclamations and laughter are heard from the onscreen creators. (4) Crisp sound effects (SFX) such as a 'crunch' sound when biting the ice cream and 'pop' sounds for text transitions are audible. (5) Sound of environmental hum at the beginning fades into clear studio-quality dialogue during the review phase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout the intro. (2) Functional Text: '299元 每支24.92' indicates price. (3) Hook Text: '超級黑馬' (Super dark horse) and '冰淇淋' (Ice cream) in colorful floating bubbles. (4) Functional Text: '雀巢美祿的 牛奶流心雪糕' (Nestle Milo Milk Flowing Heart Ice Cream). (5) Descriptive Text: '口感很好' (Texture is good) and '很好吃' (Very delicious) emphasize the taste review. (6) '這是目前的 第三根' (This is our 3rd stick) indicates popularity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Product demonstration -> Home tasting and detailed review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators visible on screen, 1 male voice heard off-screen
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young Asian women; one wears a brown layered dress with a white fuzzy shrug, the other wears a black top and a zebra-patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse-style supermarket freezer aisle followed by a clean, modern home interior with a white dining table.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, high-key studio and supermarket lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Store Discovery -> Demo -> Tasting Reaction -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an enthusiastic review of a specific food product (Milo ice cream bars) found at Costco, emphasizing its unique liquid center and good value for money to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Positive review focusing entirely on a single brand's product with visible logos and price points.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density colorful text overlays and a mix of male narration with female onscreen personality.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical high-energy social media food review format with strong visual hooks and beat-synced editing.
